name: Strawberry Fudge Balls
recipeIngredient: ½ cup Toasted almonds; finely chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese on medium speed with an electric mixer until fluffy.
2. Add the melted chocolate, beating until smooth.
3. Stir in the vanilla wafer crumbs and strawberry preserves; cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
5. Roll the balls in chopped almonds.
6. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator, or freeze for up to 2 months.
Variation: Raspberry Fudge Balls
Substitute ¼ cup red raspberry jam for the strawberry preserves and 2/3 cup finely ground, toasted pecans for the almonds.
